title: To The Spanish Admiral Count Gravina, On His Translating The Author�s Song On A Rose Into Italian Verse.
content:
My rose, Gravina, blooms anew,
    And steep�d not now in rain,
    But in Castilian streams by you,
    Will never fade again.
meaning:
"To The Spanish Admiral Count Gravina, On His Translating The Author�s Song On A Rose Into Italian Verse." is a quintessential example of William Cowper's signature style...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
